cases.passage: The discovery of King Tut's tomb in 1922 was a momentous occasion for archaeologists and historians. The tomb's contents provided a wealth of information about ancient Egyptian culture and society. One of the most significant artifacts discovered was the golden funerary mask. The mask was made of gold and weighed around 11 kilograms. It was so intricately designed that it took over 300 skilled artisans to create it. The mask was a symbol of the king's status and power in the afterlife.

questions.q: Why was the discovery of King Tut's tomb a significant occasion?
opts: (A) It provided information about modern Egyptian culture
(B) It revealed the secrets of the ancient Egyptian society
(C) It uncovered the mysteries of the afterlife
(D) It discovered the source of the Nile River
questions.explanation: The discovery of King Tut's tomb provided a wealth of information about ancient Egyptian culture and society, making it a significant occasion for archaeologists and historians.

questions.q: How many kilograms did the golden funerary mask weigh?
questions.explanation: The golden funerary mask weighed around 11 kilograms.

questions.q: How many skilled artisans took to create the golden funerary mask?
questions.explanation: It took over 300 skilled artisans to create the golden funerary mask.

questions.q: What was the golden funerary mask a symbol of?
opts: (A) The king's status and power in the physical world
(B) The king's status and power in the afterlife
questions.explanation: The golden funerary mask was a symbol of the king's status and power in the afterlife.

questions.q: What was the golden funerary mask made of?
questions.explanation: The golden funerary mask was made of gold.

cases.passage: The Valley of the Kings in Egypt is a vast burial ground for pharaohs of ancient Egypt. The tombs in this valley are some of the most well-preserved and intricately designed in the world. One of the most famous tombs is the tomb of Tutankhamun, also known as King Tut. The tomb was discovered by Howard Carter in 1922 and was found to be remarkably intact. The tomb contained a vast array of artifacts, including masks, furniture, and jewelry.

questions.q: Where is the Valley of the Kings located?
questions.explanation: The Valley of the Kings is located in Egypt, a vast burial ground for pharaohs of ancient Egypt.

questions.q: Who discovered the tomb of Tutankhamun in 1922?
questions.explanation: The tomb of Tutankhamun was discovered by Howard Carter in 1922.

questions.q: What was found remarkably intact in the tomb of Tutankhamun?
questions.explanation: The tomb of Tutankhamun was found to be remarkably intact, containing a vast array of artifacts.

questions.q: What type of artifacts were found inside the tomb of Tutankhamun?
questions.explanation: The tomb of Tutankhamun contained a vast array of artifacts, including masks, furniture, and jewelry.

questions.q: When was the tomb of Tutankhamun discovered?
questions.explanation: The tomb of Tutankhamun was discovered by Howard Carter in 1922.
